design_plan: rng_seed=42; hero_lines=2.4; aida=pass; grid_density=verified; labels_swept=ok; button_contrast=AA
headline: Super vs Siri — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Siri. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Siri

summary: Siri AI is Apple’s deeply integrated, privacy‑first assistant for people living inside the Apple ecosystem. Super is built for users who want a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer — and reuses a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time.
